revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}} }} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}}

When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}}

{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Collapsible_sections_option here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{1|}}} |Collapsible group/section
If, by default, this template's collapsible group/section is hidden ("collapsed") when the template [[Help:Transclusion|is shown]], use {{template link code|{{PAGENAME}} |{{{1}}}}} to set it to be visible ("expanded", "uncollapsed"). | How to manage this template's collapsible groups/sections option {{Unbulleted list | 1 = This template includes collapsible groups/sections. When it [[Help:Transclusion|first appears]], one of these groups/sections may be set to be visible ("expanded") while the others remain hidden ("collapsed") apart from their titlebars. To achieve this, [[Help:Template#Parameters|include the parameter]] |''name'' where ''name'' is one of the following words that identify the groups/sections (omit any speech or quotation marks): |item2_style=font-size:120%;font-weight:bold;padding:0.3em 1.4em {{#if:{{{example|}}}{{{default|}}} |0.3em |0.75em}}; | 2 = {{{list}}} |item3_style=padding-left:2.8em; | 3 = {{#if:{{{example|}}} |For example: {{template link code|{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}} |{{{example}}}  [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]}} }} }} {{#if:{{{default|}}} | * The group/section named '''{{{default}}}''' has been set to be visible when the template appears. }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
